query: UPDATE decisions SET publicVotingEndsAt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL FLOOR(24 + (id % 49) * (72 - 24) / 49) HOUR) WHERE status = 'voting' AND publicVotingEndsAt IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2TEpAERBP1fyn7r.root --database U6pRes7wCe3Tq4MFFrBU3d --execute UPDATE decisions SET publicVotingEndsAt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL FLOOR(24 + (id % 49) * (72 - 24) / 49) HOUR) WHERE status = 'voting' AND publicVotingEndsAt IS NULL;
